title: 200Pcs Gold Leaves, Artificial Fake Leaves with Stems, Fake Single Leaf for DIY Crafts Scrapbooking Home Kitchen Festival Party Decorations, Leaf decorative accessories
features: Package includes: 200 gold artificial leaves, size is 3.9*1.2 inches, the leaf part size is 2*1.2 inches, sufficient quantity to meet your daily use
High quality materials: Gold leaves is made of high quality materials, with realistic design, not easy to tear, durable and can be used for a long time

Wide range of applications: Gold leaves is suitable for decoration, and is also very suitable for making wreaths, bouquets, corsages, which can be used at weddings, parties, birthdays or anywhere you want to decorate, adding a touch of sophistication to your layout

Excellent DIY decoration: Gold leaves artificial flowers can give full play to your imagination and DIY it into anything you want to decorate, let your creativity shine with unique light and style through these gold artificial leaves
Easy to use and clean: Gold leaves artificial flowers is simple and convenient to operate, just decorate it directly where you want to decorate, and wipe it clean with a cloth when cleaning
